rules.name: Prefer data-testid
rules.description: First choice for selectors. Stable across styling changes.

rules.name: Prefer aria-label
rules.description: Second choice. Good for buttons and interactive elements.

rules.name: Allow text-based
rules.description: Fourth choice. For unique visible text.
rules.example: page.getByText('Ban đại diện cha mẹ học sinh')

rules.name: FORBIDDEN: CSS class selectors
rules.description: CSS classes change frequently. Never use for assertions.

rules.name: FORBIDDEN: Index-based selectors
rules.description: Position-based selectors break when data order changes.

rules.name: Scoped selectors for tables
rules.description: Within tables, scope to row first, then cell.

selector_registry.description: Known stable selectors in SCN codebase. Update as data-testid attributes are added.

sidebar.nav_item: Use getByText with section title from SIDEBAR_ITEMS

tables.note: SCN tables use antd Table. Rows have no data-testid by default. Use row content to identify.
tables.editable_cell: Click cell text to activate InlineEditCell

modals.dirty_guard: Modal with text containing 'chưa lưu' or 'thay đổi'
